column1:
This workbook contains a collection of key economic and financial datasets compiled by Atlas Analytics, Inc. for internal analysis and strategic planning purposes. The contents are organized into separate sheets and include the following:

- Quarterly Time Series GDP: Historical and current gross domestic product (GDP) data reported on a quarterly basis, reflecting overall economic activity and growth trends.
- Weekly Time Series GDP: High-frequency estimates of GDP, providing a more granular view of economic performance on a weekly basis.
- Weekly Financial Targets: Internal financial benchmarks and performance targets tracked weekly, used to support forecasting and decision-making.
- Quarterly Net Exports Data: Data on net exports (exports minus imports) by quarter, offering insight into trade balances and their contribution to GDP.
- Quarterly Private Inventories Data: Data on private inventories, by quarter as a contribution to GDP.

Each dataset is structured for ease of reference and may include accompanying charts or formulas for visualization and analysis.

column2: Quarterly time-series data: Actual and Atlas predicted GDP
Weekly time-series data: Atlas predicted GDP broken down into sub-component
Weekly time-series data: Atlas financial market targets
Quarterly time-series data:Atlas predicted Net Exports (trade balance)
Quarterly time-series data:Atlas predicted Private Inventories
